theme_and_archetype.vibe: Cinematic, sophisticated, aspirational, premium, glassmorphism, depth effects, parallax

palette_description.ivory: #F5EFE6 (Warm off-white for text to prevent eye strain)
palette_description.antique_gold: #C9A961 (Accent for CTAs, subtle borders, and highlights)

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

rules.anti_default: No Inter or default sans for headings. Use Playfair Display with font-light.
rules.alignment: Left-align dense text. Center-align hero and massive impact statements.
rules.contrast: Text shadow over images for WCAG AA compliance.

grid_strategy.portfolio: Masonry/Bento layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with gap-6
grid_strategy.services: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 with gap-8

spacing_and_layout.image_constraints: Mobile height max 80vh for hero images.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Subtle rounded edges (rounded-lg or rounded-xl max), no aggressive circles.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-sm tracking-[0.15em] uppercase font-semibold
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-sm tracking-[0.15em] uppercase

cards.style: bg-secondary/50 border border-border/50 backdrop-blur-sm p-8 transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:border-primary/30

inputs.style: bg-background border-b border-border border-t-0 border-x-0 rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground transition-colors

patterns.scroll_reveal: Initial opacity 0, y 40, transition ease-out duration 0.8s.
patterns.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for hero background image y-axis translation.
patterns.hover_effects: Image zoom on hover (scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out).
patterns.micro_interactions: Icon shift on hover, subtle gold glow (drop-shadow) on text.

hero.background: Cinematic dark living room image with parallax effect.
hero.content: Center or left-aligned. Overline 'Lumière By Sambita Bose'. H1 'Elevate your Home, Celebrity Style'. CTA buttons.

about.visual: High-end portrait or luxury detail shot.
about.content: Story of the brand. Signature quote in italic serif. Large typography.

services.items: Cards with Lucide icons (Crown, Building, Home, Sofa). Hover animates icon (rotate/scale) and adds subtle gold border.

portfolio.interactions: Hover reveals dark gradient overlay with title and category. Image scale 1.05.

why_choose_us.layout: Dark high-contrast section. 4 columns for counters.
why_choose_us.content: Bespoke Designs, Premium Materials, Celebrity-Level Finishing, End-to-End Execution.

testimonials.card: Glassmorphism card, gold star ratings (5 stars), elegant serif typography for the quote.

contact_cta.layout: Split section: Left side lead capture form, Right side contact details & map.
contact_cta.form: Minimal, border-bottom only inputs (Name, Phone, Email, Project Type). Submit button full width.
contact_cta.details: Address in Rohini, Delhi. Google Map iframe (dark mode styled if possible via CSS filter). WhatsApp quick connect CTA button (bg-green-600 or styled to brand gold).

footer.layout: Minimalist, py-20. Large brand wordmark at the top. Grid for links and social icons.

logo.description: Gold wordmark and ornate chair on black background.

hero_background.description: Sleek modern living room featuring dark tones and elegant furnishings with ambient lighting.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode is strictly forced or is the default theme across the app.
Use Playfair Display for all H1-H4 headings and Manrope for body text. Make sure to import them via Google Fonts.
For the hero section, implement a cinematic parallax scroll effect using framer-motion.
When applying gold accents, use text-primary or bg-primary. Do not overwhelm the dark theme; let the black background create the luxury feel.
Do not use generic Shadcn button styles for the primary CTAs; adhere strictly to the sharp, non-rounded button styles defined in the components section.
Inject the provided logo in the sticky header and the footer.
Ensure the layout relies heavily on generous padding (py-24 or py-32) to let the typography and images breathe.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
